title: Nylium Nasturtium
description: Found rarely in Crimson and Warped forests of the Nether, Nylium Nasturtium grows hot petals which can be collected and used for fuel in a furnace.
body:
# This mod adds a rare flowering crop, Nylium Nasturtium

Found rarely in the Crimson and Warped forests of the Nether, Nylium Nasturtium grows hot petals which can be collected and used for fuel in a furnace.

# How do I use it?

Right click the fully grown crop to collect its petals and seeds or use an enchanted hoe for more drops when broke.

![A furnace example showing a single Nylium Nasturtium petal in the fuel slot cooking a raw chicken which is in the item slot](https://i.imgur.com/wvnLsGh.png)


# What does it look like?

![The Nylium Nasturtium plant which has orange petals next to lava in a Crimson Forest biome](https://i.imgur.com/X9iGMlM.png)

![The Nylium Nasturtium plant which has orange petals in a Warped Crimson Forest biome](https://i.imgur.com/3UKtICg.png)


# Can I use this in my modpack?
Yes you can!
